饱蘸的挚文述说，映射出毛泽东日常生活的点点滴滴。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/aa5123e165ac74f7f47178dd2cd98490~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"武立金
